_README: Configuration for trace-collector.py and trace-flush.py. Edit this file to adapt CastFlow to non-Unity/C# projects without modifying Python code. All fields are optional - missing fields fall back to the defaults baked into the hook scripts. Fields starting with underscore are inline comments (JSON has no native comment syntax).
_comment_tracked_extensions: File extensions whose edits are recorded by trace-collector. Add your project's primary source-code extensions here. Default covers 18 mainstream languages.
_comment_excluded_extensions: File extensions explicitly skipped even if they accidentally match tracked_extensions. Used to filter out asset/binary files from being treated as code edits.
_comment_generic_dir_segments: Directory names treated as 'generic containers' when inferring the module from a file path. trace-flush walks the path from leaf to root and skips these segments before settling on a module label. Add your project's top-level container directories here (e.g. 'app', 'pkg', 'internal') to avoid 'app' becoming a module name.
_comment_module_dir_pattern: Regex used by trace-flush.infer_modules() to extract a module name when a path contains a 'Modules/<Name>' segment. Group 1 must capture the module name. Set to a project-specific pattern if your repo uses a different convention (e.g. 'features/([^/]+)' or 'packages/([^/]+)/src').
